description_long: This house features a prominent gable roof with dark shingles and a light-colored exterior, likely finished in stucco or painted siding. The structure is single-story and includes a main building with a smaller attached section, possibly a garage or utility room. The property is bordered by a paved driveway and a rectangular patch of green, which could represent a lawn or garden. Windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern along the visible facades, and the main entryway is accentuated by a small porch with steps and a modest overhang. The overall design is simple and functional, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The house is situated adjacent to a wide, straight road, suggesting a suburban or residential neighborhood context.
description: A single-story house with a gable roof, light exterior, symmetrical windows, and a small porch entryway, set beside a driveway and lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, and symmetrical window arrangement facing the road.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached section (likely a garage) and the driveway running parallel to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, green lawn area, and the full width of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entry or utility area and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with small porch, steps, and a modest overhang
